Video.summary: Talking pets, a DIY bee suit fail, and a musical montage of funny wedding wishes.

Video.summary: A woman faints at her surprise party, graduation goofs abound, and comical canines charm.

Video.summary: Videos include a bear - getting slapped for sniffing another bear's butt; and a - flower girl who goes on strike.
Video.title: Episode 401

Video.summary: Two dogs honk a car horn; a bull plays soccer; a little - girl runs on stage; a goat comes to a sudden stop.
Video.title: Episode 402

Video.summary: A bridesmaid with an itchy bottom; - a woman runs into a glass door; and two tough karate guys getting scared.
Video.title: Episode 403

Video.summary: A man sticks a straw up his nose; a little leaguer can't - wait to pee; a woodpecker hammers an aluminum - ladder.
Video.title: Episode 404

Video.summary: Videos include a girl pouring water down a funnel - into a boy's pants; a little girl runs from a frog in a - cup.
Video.title: Episode 405
